description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.23.10 routes active Claude OAuth token accounts through OAuth mode, keeps Claude sessionKey accounts on the web/cookie path, and reports OAuth, Web, and CLI failures together in Claude Auto mode.
